        "id": "Class:Person",

        "source_tables": [

        ],

        ]
      }

        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "Classification or role type of the person."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasFirstName",
        "label": "has first name",
        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "Given name of the person."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasLastName",
        "label": "has last name",
        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "Family name of the person."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasAddress",
        "label": "has address",
        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "Postal address of the person."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasEmail",
        "label": "has email",
        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "Email address of the person."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasHomepage",
        "label": "has homepage",
        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:anyURI",
        "description": "Web homepage URL of the person."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasPhone",
        "label": "has phone",
        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:string",
        "description": "Phone contact information for the person."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasURI",
        "label": "has URI",
        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:anyURI",
        "description": "URI identifier or reference for the person."
      },
      {
        "id": "DataProperty:hasPhoto",
        "label": "has photo",
        "domain": "Class:Person",
        "datatype": "xsd:anyURI",
        "description": "URL or reference to a photo of the person."
      }
